{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230145541AB22103CB5834EC5CC2"}"},"total":866},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7576337039044543256","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很好，写出了那种天才的傲慢和研究能力，不像有些书里的天才，发明创造是没有的，只能靠系统抽奖获得知识或者道具，或者直接跑到黑塔手下打工，没有一点天才的特立独行。这个就很好，靠自己发明了贤者之石，又建造了特殊的多元化世界吸引黑塔加入，而不是依靠系统抽来的特殊道具。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764006837,"group_id":"7557379887166671934","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz4KQ8ahkL1xnn5UxSn7/8675GYdu2agKbjlSR5DvE3W","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7977b946969f4a64b1a77595a1b5ad23~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790384&x-signature=KpnZEqYRnq%2BE%2BtpNMbXW4pOOQGs%3D","user_id":"1412243772676176","user_name":"非常好奇的黑骑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1412243772676176","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7557379887166671934","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越癫佬横行的星穹铁道，昔年，因向往星空，所以登上了星穹列车，阅览无尽寰宇的风光……
那是一段令赫尔墨斯至今都还在怀念的岁月，他曾一度认为，他会在开拓的道路上越走越远，但就在他走到令使的门槛的时候，阿基维利的陨落，是令他如此的措不及防。
开拓的命途就此沉寂，恰逢故乡出现事故，他便回到了故乡，耗费了些许时光，专门为故乡研究出了一套适宜的行星修复技术，真正踏足了智识命途！
直到后来，赫尔墨斯在星空旅途中，恰巧遇到一颗被虚无吞噬的文明星球，心有所感，开始进行潜心研究。
最终，在今日自然而然的就研究出虚数与量子的一丝本质，加冠了独属于赫尔墨斯自身的令使大权。
恰恰在此时，他的耳边骤然响起一声熟悉而有陌生的声音——
【叮！开拓的智慧加入聊天群】
就此，智识的令使，开始踏足诸天万界！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/661550fdde91d8a4089cf87fd69a672b","author":"一路游荡","author_id":"","book_id":"7557379887166671934","book_name":"都被博识尊选中了，聊天群才来","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":381,"name":"聊天群","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=381&name=聊天群&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7557380287890457150","read_count":"91543","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"712213"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"342","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,诸天万界,聊天群,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4ddd7ef5aeef33b1e2b4aa34a3d331cf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779385554&x-signature=3%2BxuFu4mHYRgdgqOrVuSu%2BPRhUM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"351438635799581","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1528"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230145541AB22103CB5834EC5CC2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读23小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":185,"forwarded
